hero.subtitle: AI-powered static analysis that watches your entire codebase for dead code, circular dependencies, and architectural issues.

features.title: Everything Your Codebase Needs
features.subtitle: Six powerful detectors working together to keep your code clean, maintainable, and architecturally sound.

circular.title: Circular Dependencies
circular.description: Detect architectural cycles between modules that create tight coupling and make refactoring dangerous.

deadCode.title: Dead Code Detection
deadCode.description: Find unused imports, abandoned classes, unreachable methods, and orphan files across your entire project.

hardwiring.title: Hardwiring Detection
hardwiring.description: Catch magic strings, repeated literals, hardcoded IPs, and environment calls outside config files.

aiReview.title: AI-Assisted Review
aiReview.description: AI classifies findings as true positives, false positives, or needs-context — reducing noise so you focus on real issues.

policy.title: Policy-Driven Analysis
policy.description: Customize behavior per project with layered policies. Built-in plugins for Laravel, Django, and WordPress.

multiLang.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLang.description: Analyze PHP, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Vue files in a single pass with unified dependency graphs.

pipeline.title: How It Works
pipeline.subtitle: Six stages, one command. From raw source code to actionable insights.

index.title: Index
index.description: Parse files, extract symbols, store in SQLite

graph.title: Graph
graph.description: Build file-level dependency graph, compute metrics

detect.title: Detect
detect.description: Run dead-code and hardwiring detector passes

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Apply saved exclusion rules from prior reviews

review.title: AI Review
review.description: AI classifies remaining findings for accuracy

cta.title: Start Guarding Your Code
cta.subtitle: One command to analyze your entire codebase. Open source, forever free.

footer.tagline: AI-powered code guardian. Open source, forever free.
footer.motto: Built with AI, guarded by mythology.

meta.title: AigisCode — AI-Powered Code Guardian
meta.description: AI-powered static analysis that watches your entire codebase for dead code, circular dependencies, and architectural issues. Open source.
